zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Philip de Maunsell於1420年3月4日出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根奧可維其時，他的父親Sir Knt John de Maunsell21歲，母親Lady Cecily De Cantelupe25歲。他於1444年5月10日與Mabel ferch Gruffud在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根奧可維其結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1471年5月4日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀素爾茲巴-洛森格希享年51歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀素爾茲巴-洛森格希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Philip de Maunsell于1420年3月4日出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根奧可維其时，他的父亲Sir Knt John de Maunsell21岁，母亲Lady Cecily De Cantelupe25岁。他于1444年5月10日与Mabel ferch Gruffud在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根奧可維其结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1471年5月4日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀素爾茲巴-洛森格希享年51岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀素爾茲巴-洛森格希。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maunsell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mansell
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Old French mansel ‘inhabitant of Le Mans or the surrounding area of Maine’. The place was originally named in Latin (ad) Ceromannos, from the name of the Gaulish tribe living there, the Ceromanni. The name was shortened to Celmans and then became Le Mans as a result of the mistaken identification of the first syllable with the Old French demonstrative adjective.
status name for a particular type of feudal tenant, Anglo-Norman French mansel, one who occupied a manse (from Late Latin mansa ‘dwelling’), a measure of land sufficient to support one family.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Philip de Maunsell was born on 4 March 1420, in Oxwich, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Knt John de Maunsell, was 21 and his mother, Lady Cecily De Cantelupe, was 25. He married Mabel ferch Gruffud on 10 May 1444, in Oxwich, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 4 May 1471, in See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Amberg-Sulzbach, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 51, and was buried in See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Amberg-Sulzbach, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Philip de Maunsell est né le 4 mars 1420, à Oxwich, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Knt John de Maunsell, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Cecily De Cantelupe, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mabel ferch Gruffud le 10 mai 1444, à Oxwich, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1471, à See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Philip de Maunsell am 4. März 1420 in Oxwich, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Knt John de Maunsell 21 und seine Mutter Lady Cecily De Cantelupe 25. Er hat am 10. Mai 1444 in Oxwich, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Mabel ferch Gruffud geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Mai 1471 im Alter von 51 Jahren in See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Philip de Maunsell è nato il il 4 marzo 1420 nel Oxwich, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Knt John de Maunsell, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Cecily De Cantelupe, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mabel ferch Gruffud il 10 maggio 1444, nel Oxwich, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 maggio 1471, nel See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Philip de Maunsellが1420年3月4日にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンオクスウィチで生まれた時，父Sir Knt John de Maunsellは21歳，母Lady Cecily De Cantelupeは25歳であった。1444年5月10日にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンオクスウィチでMabel ferch Gruffudと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年5月4日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンバーグ-スルズバチスルズバチ-ローセンバーグセで51歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンバーグ-スルズバチスルズバチ-ローセンバーグセにて埋葬された。

ko.See, Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아버그-설즈바치 설즈바ch-로즈버그 시
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Philip de Maunsell(이)가 1420년 3월 4일 영국 웨일스 글램르건 스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Knt John de Maunsell(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Cecily De Cantelupe(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1444년 5월 10일 영국 웨일스 글램르건 스위치에서 Mabel ferch Gruffud(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년 5월 4일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아버그-설즈바치 설즈바ch-로즈버그 시에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아버그-설즈바치 설즈바ch-로즈버그 시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Philip de Maunsell nasceu em 4 de março de 1420, em Oxwich, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Knt John de Maunsell, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Cecily De Cantelupe, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabel ferch Gruffud em 10 de maio de 1444, em Oxwich, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1471, em See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemanha, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Amberg-Sulzbach: си, сулзбач-росенбирг, ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия
ru.See, Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Germany: си, сулзбач-росенбирг, ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Philip de Maunsell родился 4 марта 1420 г. в местности оксвич, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Knt John de Maunsell было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Cecily De Cantelupe, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel ferch Gruffud 10 мая 1444 г. в местности оксвич, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 мая 1471 г. в местности си, сулзбач-росенбирг, ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности си, сулзбач-росенбирг, ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия.

es.4 March 1420–4 May 1471: 4 de marzo de 1420–4 de mayo de 1471
es.See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Amberg-Sulzbach: See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemania
es.See, Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Germany: See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Philip de Maunsell nació el 4 de marzo de 1420, en Oxwich, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Knt John de Maunsell, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Cecily De Cantelupe, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Mabel ferch Gruffud el 10 de mayo de 1444, en Oxwich, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1471, en See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en See, Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemania.
